lines.text: Waves will catch you (oh) / Light will catch you (oh) / Love will catch you (oh) / Spirit gon' catch you, yeah (ooh-ooh) / Flashes capture us
Lyin' in reflections / Moonlight hits your skin / Safe in conversation / You question where I've been
Two bodies on this mattress (ooh, yeah) / Save me as it sinks (ooh, yeah) / Automatic self-protection (ooh, yeah) / Like airbags in my limbs
Next thing I'm drifting into open sky / And I don't feel so scared / Dreamin' with these open eyes / I'm grabbin' at the air
Waves will catch you, light will catch you / Love will catch you, spirit gon' catch you, yeah / Faith will catch you, friends will catch you / Time will catch you, flash will capture us
Travelling for healing / I been speaking, I had to, speak to myself / How far will I go? / Spirit, spirit, yeah / Still wear that chain you gave me / That eagle made of gold
And now I'm driftin' into open skies (Yeah) / I ain't scared as before, ain't as scared as before
Like, is anybody out there? / Like signals, messages, everything / (Spirit gon' catch you)
Just like Jonathan Livingston Seagull (Woo) / Try catch the clouds as I free fall (Yeah) / I was caught by the wings of my people (Woo) / Then you pick me up in your two-door (Yeah)

Shutting down is your default (Woo) / Circling for a cheat code (Yeah) / Sun is out and it feels cold (Woo) / Camera zoom on the eagle (Yeah) / Reconnect with the real goal (Woo) / Camera zoom on my people (Yeah)
